title: Queries — index of every brain ask / counsel
html:
Queries — what your brain has been asked

Auto-generated by Dataview. Sortable by date / verb / question. Every row is a brain ask or brain counsel answer the vault has produced for you. The takeaway column is the headline insight, not a recap.

TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Query",
  file.cday as "Date",
  default(verb, "ask") as "Verb",
  default(question, file.name) as "Question",
  default(takeaway, "—") as "One-line takeaway"
FROM "wiki/queries"
WHERE file.name != "_INDEX"
SORT file.cday DESC

Recent — last 7 days

TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Query",
  file.cday as "Date",
  default(verb, "ask") as "Verb",
  default(takeaway, "—") as "One-line takeaway"
FROM "wiki/queries"
WHERE file.name != "_INDEX" AND date(now) - file.cday <= dur(7 days)
SORT file.cday DESC
LIMIT 7

All-time count

TABLE WITHOUT ID
  length(rows) as "Total queries"
FROM "wiki/queries"
WHERE file.name != "_INDEX"
GROUP BY true

Count by verb

TABLE WITHOUT ID
  default(key, "ask") as "Verb",
  length(rows) as "Count"
FROM "wiki/queries"
WHERE file.name != "_INDEX"
GROUP BY default(verb, "ask")
SORT length(rows) DESC

How this works

  • Every brain ask or brain counsel writes a file into wiki/queries/ with frontmatter: verb, question, takeaway.
  • Dataview indexes those fields and renders the tables above.
  • To add a new takeaway after the fact: open the query file, edit the takeaway: line in frontmatter, save. The table re-renders within ~2.5 seconds (per the Dataview refresh interval).
  • The takeaway should be a single sharp sentence — the surprising finding, not a recap.
